3143830.name: REDSTREAM
3143830.description:
A Bodycam Horror Nightmare

ABOUT THIS GAME

From the creators of Amber Alert —
REDSTREAM is a brutal, photorealistic bodycam horror shooter that follows the aftermath of the Amber Alert Incident.

The Murder of Crows – Unit 6 (MOC-6) has been deployed to investigate a derelict apartment complex disguised as a homeless shelter — believed to be the broadcasting hub of a dark-web gore ring known only as RedStream.

Inside, every floor hides something worse than the one below:
twisted experiments, improvised traps, and human predators turned monsters by obsession and profit.

Your objective:
find the missing girl, expose the RedStream source, and reach the extraction point alive.

But this isn’t a mission.
It’s a descent — and someone is still streaming.

FEATURES

🔴 True Motion Bodycam System
A fully physical player movement system — every step, breath, and impact feels raw, unstable, and real.

🔴 Physical Animation Combat
Ragdoll physics and body collisions blend with hand-animated realism — shoot, stumble, and struggle for survival in close quarters.

🔴 Lumen Lighting Horror
Real-time global illumination builds claustrophobic tension in flickering hallways and damp corridors.

🔴 Procedural Gore & Reactions
Enemies crumble, trip, or crawl — no scripted deaths. Every encounter unfolds differently.

🔴 Mission-Based Progression
Fight your way floor by floor through the shelter. Each level offers a new tone, new threats, and hidden surprises.

🔴 VHS Retrieval System
Collect hidden VHS tapes to unlock bonus missions, experimental game modes, and fragments of the RedStream archives.

🔴 Unfiltered Terror
Inspired by real tactical footage — raw, grounded, and suffocatingly realistic. No HUD. No handholding. Just the mission.

BACKGROUND

The Amber case was supposed to be over.
But after months of silence, fragments of footage began reappearing — uploaded to hidden servers under one name: REDSTREAM.

Now MOC-6 enters the last known source —
a “shelter” that never saved anyone.

KEY INFO

  • Genre: Psychological Horror / Tactical Shooter / Survival

  • Engine: Unreal Engine 5 (Lumen + Chaos Physics)

  • Mode: Single-Player (extra modes unlockable)

  • Estimated Playtime: 90 minutes core campaign

  • Universe: Predecessor to Amber Alert

英语*
